chapter_title.ar: باب فِي أَنَّهُ إِذَا قِيلَ فِي الرَّجُلِ شَيْ‏ءٌ فَلَمْ يَكُنْ فِيهِ وَ كَانَ فِي وَلَدِهِ أَوْ وَلَدِ وَلَدِهِ فَإِنَّهُ هُوَ الَّذِي قِيلَ فِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 127 – Regarding that when something is said regarding the man and does not happen to be in him, and it happens to be in his son, or a son of his son, so it is that which was said regarding him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/238)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/238)
text: إِذَا قُلْنَا فِي رَجُلٍ قَوْلًا فَلَمْ يَكُنْ فِيهِ وَ كَانَ فِي وَلَدِهِ أَوْ وَلَدِ وَلَدِهِ فَلَا تُنْكِرُوا ذَلِكَ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى يَفْعَلُ مَا يَشَاءُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazan, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Ibrahim Bin Umar Al Yamai,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘We<sup>asws</sup> would say words regarding a man, so it may not happen in him, and it may happen in his son, or a son of his son, therefore do not be denying that, for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Does whatever He<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires to’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Ibrahim ibn ‘Umar al-Yamani from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “If we would say something about a man and it would not be found in him but it would be found in his sons or his grandsons you must not reject it. It is because Allah does what he wants.”
